title: Brave + Bold Collection
excerpt: Friends, I’m so excited to announce my latest collection with American Crafts, right in time for the new year: Brave + Bold ! This bright, colorful collection radiates happiness, positive energy and creative vibes - everything we need to start…
body:
Friends, I’m so excited to announce my latest collection with American Crafts, right in time for the new year: Brave + Bold! This bright, colorful collection radiates happiness, positive energy and creative vibes - everything we need to start off 2021!

We’re bringing back some of your favorite scrapbooking staples like double-sided patterned paper, alphabet thickers (and phrases!), a boxed card set, an acrylic stamp set and sticker books (my favorite!). New to Brave + Bold are these fun vinyl stickers that you can attach to water bottles, electronic devices and anywhere you want to be a little bold. My very popular travel watercolor set is also being re-released in this collection with new and improved pigments and colors. And how cute is it in pink?! We’ve also got a 3-pack of clicky gel pens (that write amazingly well), traveler’s notebooks inserts, hexagon-shaped puffy stickers and some fun little magnetic bookmarks!

I hope you love this new collection and find fresh creative inspiration from these pieces. Brave + Bold should be available for purchase around mid-February so keep an eye out wherever you shop for scrapbooking supplies and make sure to sign up for my newsletter for the latest updates on the collection.

***UPDATE*** Brave + Bold is now available to purchase ONLINE!

SHOP NOW

Let me know in the comments: what’s your favorite item in the Brave + Bold collection?
